topic: Run 4 — TOTAL RISK CLOSURE for the spec-memory dual-stack CLI: terminally classify every remaining MITIGATED, DEFERRED, and hedged item so nothing is unknown. PREMISE (settled, do not relitigate): the run-1 GO verdict, run-2 CLI design, and run-3 risk matrix — read ../research.md (all 13 sections), ../cli-backend/lineages/gpt/research.md, and ../risk-resolution/lineages/{deepseek-risk,mimo-risk}/research.md AS INPUT. MISSION: every item below ends RESOLVED (file:line or measured evidence) or ACCEPTED (explicit rationale). MITIGATED is terminal ONLY when the named mitigation is itself fully specified (exact file, mechanism, acceptance test) AND verified sufficient by code-trace or measurement — a vague mitigation is not terminal. Newly discovered risks or unknowns become new key questions requiring the same terminal classification. Read-only bash measurements are allowed; file mutation outside your artifact dir is not. The seed register: RQ1 spawn/lease races to terminal — code-trace the triple-lock (bootstrap lock, owner lease, respawn guard) plus re-read CAS across the actual launcher source; prove or refute that two simultaneous CLI auto-spawns can double-spawn the daemon; fully specify delta D1 (dual-simultaneous-spawn vitest: exact file, harness, assertions) and D7 (heartbeat self-shutdown on the CLI-spawn path — who reaps a CLI-spawned daemon when no MCP session exists; orphan precedent: six orphaned mk-skill-advisor launchers observed on this host). RQ2 hook latency to terminal — verify the warm-path latency claim by measurement on this host; map per-runtime hook timeout ceilings with file:line evidence from the actual hook configurations (Claude settings hooks, OpenCode plugin hooks, Codex hooks.json, Gemini); pin the integration policy (which hook types may shell out to the CLI warm-only; cold path reserved for SessionStart/cron); verify D4 (--timeout-ms) plus stale-while-revalidate are fully specified and sufficient. RQ3 build/activation drift to terminal — code-trace the launcher build-check on the spawn path; fully specify DD-001 dist-freshness check in the shim (exact comparison inputs, staleness signal, warn-plus-exit-69 semantics); confirm the coverage gap is closed. RQ4 platform/socket to terminal — measure the actual default socket path length on this host against the 104-char macOS sun_path limit; verify the existing short-dir pin with file:line; fully specify D6 (shim short-socket-dir handling); confirm the TCP fallback path with file:line; classify the Windows non-goal as ACCEPTED with explicit rationale. RQ5 OpenCode tools-gate deferral to terminal — establish what the INSTALLED opencode version supports today for shell-tool permission gating (inspect binary help, config schema, local docs, read-only); verify run-3's claim that dual-stack does not need the gate at all; produce a terminal classification for THIS packet's dual-stack scope plus a crisp statement of exactly what remains upstream-only and why it cannot be closed from this repo. RQ6 migration map to terminal — replace the ~125-reference estimate with a MEASURED inventory: enumerate every mk-spec-memory MCP tool reference across agent allowed-tools, command YAML/markdown, runtime hooks, doctor scripts, deep-loop allowlists, and opencode.json; emit exact per-surface file lists and counts; classify the migration as fully-mapped with execution ACCEPTED as a future packet (out of dual-stack scope by design). RQ7 design-delta completeness — audit D1-D7 plus DD-001 as a set: each fully specified (file, mechanism, acceptance criteria); re-derive the ~2-2.5d absorption estimate and the consolidated 10-13d estimate bottom-up; hunt for any missing ninth delta the set does not cover. RQ8 residual-unknown sweep — adversarial pass over ../research.md, ../cli-backend/lineages/gpt/research.md, and the packet spec.md plus implementation-summary.md Known Limitations for every hedged claim (unverified, likely, should, research-grade, assumed, estimate): enumerate each, then verify, measure, or terminally classify it — including the registry-coverage-1-of-3 limitation, the MiMo deepseek-informed methodology note (classify ACCEPTED), and the final effort-estimate confidence. The loop is done only when every seed and discovered question is terminally classified: zero UNRESOLVED, zero unexamined hedges.
